_comment: Shipped preset for LTX-Video 2.3 first-last-frame to video (from ComfyUI's bundled video_ltx2_3_flf2v template). Outer graph: LoadImage #31 (first frame) + LoadImage #39 (last frame) -> subgraph #129 -> SaveVideo #68. The subgraph's inner positive CLIPTextEncode is #128 (composite id `129:128`); we wire main_prompt into its `text` widget so the user's prompt guides the in-between motion. Empty prompt falls back to a generic default that doesn't tie to any specific keyframe content.
label: Local LTX 2.3 FLF2V
description: LTX-Video 2.3 first-last-frame to video. Wire TWO images into the stage (first frame, last frame); the model fills in the motion between them. The text prompt guides the in-between motion (camera move, mood, music). Requires the LTX 2.3 model files — see workflows/video/README.md.

image.error: FLF2V needs a FIRST-frame image — wire one into the stage's images.image0 slot.
FLF2V needs a LAST-frame image — wire a second image into the stage's images.image1 slot.

text.default: Smooth natural motion between the two keyframes, cinematic camera move.
